metadata.description: Core tutoring domain logic: sessions, scheduling, and geolocation

MUST: Class sessions MUST have start_time and end_time timestamps
Session booking MUST validate tutor availability
Geolocation MUST use PostGIS in production environments
Service area restrictions MUST prevent bookings outside jurisdiction
Notification system MUST send booking confirmations
All database operations MUST handle timezone-aware datetimes
Tutor leads MUST expire after configurable days (default: 7)
Database connection MUST timeout gracefully without crashes
SHOULD: Session cancellation SHOULD notify both tutor and client
Zoom integration SHOULD auto-generate meeting links
Location-based searches SHOULD use geospatial queries when available
Client notifications SHOULD include session reminders 24 hours prior
Session history SHOULD be queryable by date range
MAY: Session recordings MAY be stored for client review
Analytics MAY track tutor performance metrics
Recommendation engine MAY suggest tutors based on ratings
Calendar sync MAY be integrated with Google Calendar
SMS notifications MAY be sent as alternative to email
MUST_NOT: Session data MUST NOT be accessible without authentication
Geolocation queries MUST NOT work without GDAL/PostGIS in production
Middleware MUST NOT expose raw database errors to clients
Service area boundaries MUST NOT be modifiable by regular users
Expired tutor leads MUST NOT generate new notifications
